title: gynostemma pentaphyllum f. dasycarpum
intro: Gynostemma pentaphyllum f. dasycarpum, also known as the five-leaf ginseng or jiaogulan, is a variant of the Gynostemma pentaphyllum plant, a perennial vine native to China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its adaptogenic and antioxidant properties, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress. The medicinal properties of Gynostemma pentaphyllum f. dasycarpum have been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and fatigue. In herbal medicine, Gynostemma pentaphyllum f. dasycarpum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance vitality and longevity.
